publishedAbstract: - A large deletion in an OpenShift environment results in no capacity change in the Ceph OCS environment.- Ceph OCS cluster is too full after deletion in OpenShift when Nodes with SSD NVMe disks are in use.- Observe that storage in your Ceph cluster is reaching capacity despite efforts to clean up or reduce PVs- Ceph Tools may show high `%RAW USED` that does not match your expected total based on allocated storage.- How to implement fstrim via root crontab
publishedTitle: Shift: How to clean up Ceph storage after large deletion in OpenShift
